title: Bat Removal & Exclusion Services in Roslyn, NY
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Roslyn, Long Island. Humane bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Roslyn's historic homes and tree-lined properties provide ideal roosting sites for bats seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and wall voids. Our professional bat removal and exclusion services protect your Roslyn property while safely and humanely removing bat colonies in full compliance with New York wildlife laws. We specialize in permanent solutions that prevent bats from returning to your home or business.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Roslyn and the Greater Long Island area with specialized bat removal expertise. Our licensed technicians use humane exclusion methods, provide thorough attic decontamination, and offer guaranteed results with warranties that give Roslyn homeowners complete peace of mind.
localContext: Roslyn's elegant Victorian and Colonial homes, particularly those near the Roslyn Harbor waterfront and around the historic Roslyn Clock Tower area, often feature the architectural complexities that bats exploit for entry. The mature trees throughout Roslyn Estates and East Hills neighborhoods attract bat populations that frequently seek indoor roosting sites as seasons change.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Roslyn, NY?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Roslyn typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and the complexity of your home's architecture. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Is bat removal legal in Roslyn and New York State?
faqs.answer: Yes, but bat removal in New York is strictly regulated to protect bat populations. Exclusion work cannot be performed during maternity season (May 1 through August 15) when flightless young are present. Our licensed technicians follow all state and federal guidelines to ensure humane, legal bat removal.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have bats in my Roslyn home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds in walls or attics at dusk or dawn, visible droppings (guano) that resemble mouse droppings but crumble to dust, brown staining near entry points, and seeing bats exit your home at sunset. We offer free inspections to assess your situation and identify all entry points.

faqs.question: What does the bat exclusion process involve?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive process includes a thorough inspection to locate all entry points, installation of one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave but not return, sealing all secondary entry points, attic cleanup and decontamination if needed, and insulation replacement when necessary. We guarantee our work and provide follow-up inspections to ensure complete bat removal.
